I'm [**William Chi**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chiwilliam/), a software engineer and student

I am a Computer Science student at [@University of Florida](https://www.ufl.edu/) focused on full-stack engineering, iOS development, and building production-ready software.

When I’m not *programming*, you can find me doing everything car related (GR86 🏎️), trying out new foods, hiking, or traveling (my favorite city is SF)
